_comment: ADOPT: the allowed-issuers registry — the attestation contract's key-distribution half (Loom 2.0 §6). core/attestations.mjs VERIFIES against this file: only attestations from an issuer listed here, checked by the named mechanism, count as authenticated. The ed25519 mechanism is verified in-process (real crypto, negative-tested); ci-oidc and sigstore mechanisms are verified by the platform in CI — until you wire them and record activation evidence, they report UNVERIFIED-HERE rather than silently passing. Own this file in CODEOWNERS by a non-builder group.

issuers.description: The protected CI runner's OIDC identity — gate evidence envelopes
Human approval attestations (control functions) via sigstore/cosign
DEMO reference issuer — a real ed25519 key pair; the private key is NOT shipped (regenerate your own; this one signs only the bundled example anchor)
